channel.title: GitHub on Cyril's Cloud & AI Daily
channel.description: Recent content in GitHub on Cyril's Cloud & AI Daily

item.title: Add GitHub accounts to your keychain - Visual Studio (Windows)
item.description:
Adding public GitHub accounts You can add your public GitHub account at first launch or later, without needing to sign into Visual Studio with a Microsoft account, work account, or sc… If you have GitHub Copilot installed, you can add a GitHub account with a Copilot subscription by selecting Sign in to use Copilot from the GitHub Copilot status.

🔗 Read the full article

Curated by Cyril Bou-Harb — Solution Engineer, Cloud & AI at Microsoft. Views are my own.

item.title: Get Started with GitHub Copilot - Training
item.description:
Get started with GitHub Copilot Intermediate Developer GitHub This module introduces developers to the GitHub Copilot products, the benefits that GitHub Copilot provides to developers, the GitHub Copilot and GitHub Copilot Chat product features, and the GitHub Copilot extensions for Visual Studio Code. Add Prerequisites An active subscription for.

🔗 Read the full article

Curated by Cyril Bou-Harb — Solution Engineer, Cloud & AI at Microsoft. Views are my own.
